task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Sales Orders' module has been enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Sales Orders' visible as an active tab or link in the left navigation pane of the Manager.io interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opened the form to create a new Sales Order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screen showing the 'New Sales Order' data entry form in Manager.io.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct customer and reference number were entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Sales Order form. The 'Customer' field must show 'Alfreds Futterkiste' and the 'Reference' field must show 'SO-90210'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the line item details (description, quantity, and unit price) were entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the line items section of the form. The description must contain 'Priority Support' (or 'Annual Priority Support Plan 2026'), the 'Qty' (Quantity) must be 1, and the 'Unit price' must be 2400.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Sales Order was successfully created and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a view/summary screen of the saved Sales Order or the Sales Orders list showing the new entry for 'Alfreds Futterkiste' with reference 'SO-90210' and a total amount of 2,400.00.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Manager.io graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with the Manager.io application window or web interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered data into the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data should be typed into the specific input fields of the Manager.io Sales Order form, not into a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the results are from genuine software interaction and not HTML manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open or used to fake the final success screens.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Module: 'Sales Orders'. Expected Customer: 'Alfreds Futterkiste'. Expected Reference: 'SO-90210'. Expected Line Item Description: Must contain 'Priority Support' (e.g., 'Annual Priority Support Plan 2026'). Expected Quantity: 1. Expected Unit Price: 2400. Expected Total Amount: 2400.0.
